subject: feat(branding): update app icon to Farlume F on cmyk blue
body:
Changed from green (#10b981) B monogram to blue (#45aeee) F monogram
to match the Farlume name and Vivid theme combo. Same bold geometric
style — top bar, crossbar, vertical stem, optically centered.
Regenerated all PNG sizes and favicon.ico via generate-icons.mjs.
